description: Haitian-American street gang founded in 1990 in Miami, Florida, initially as a vigilante self-defense group. Engages in drug trafficking, robbery, murder, prostitution, and racketeering. Expanded across Florida and other states, with territory reaching Virginia by 2006. A faction called ZMF was involved in the 2018 murder of XXXTentacion.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: South Florida , Chicago , New York City , Quebec , and the Bahamas
country_links.context: The Zoe Pound has territory in the Bahamas.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: South Florida , Chicago , New York City , Quebec , and the Bahamas
country_links.context: The Zoe Pound has territory in Quebec, Canada.
